title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Guardtech Cleanrom Ltd
body: "Application number 5347  Applicant Guardtech Cleanrooms Ltd objected to the name used by Guardtech Cleanrom Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 3 September 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Guardtech Cleanrom Ltd is changed to 15942403, Ltd. "
